mission.title: cert-manager: Add ACME DigitalOcean DNS01 provider
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:
Add a DigitalOcean DNS provider for ACME   

**Which issue this PR fixes**:

Fixes #935 

**Special notes for your reviewer:**

Based of #900 witch is itself based of #821 and #345.
Thanks goes to @kragniz @dl00 and @Richard87.

I properly ran the hack hooks with `make generate`.

**Release note**:

```release-note
Add DigitalOcean DNS Provider
```

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
